name: Delululemon City Takeover Escape
description:
In the six months since Delululemon™ swept into your city, it brought a wave of promise: fresh jobs, spruced-up public spots, and an irresistible parade of women in buttery-soft DeluluSpandex™ leggings that hugged every curve with hypnotic allure. The brand didn't stop at athleisure—it seeped into cafés, gyms, and even the police station, where pink Delulivery™ vans cruised the streets and Delulu stores bloomed on every block. All praised by city officials for the company's lavish donations and community involvement...

It wasn't until a few nights ago the illusion shattered. One late night, you witness two of their Brand Ambassadors kidnapping and abducting another girl. After a useless police report, you start noticing suspicious Delululemon™ activity everywhere around you.

...and now, Delululemon™ appears to be upping the ante. You're at home as two of their Brand Ambassadors come knocking on your door.

This is an open city sandbox scenario where Delululemon™, their MANY Brand Ambassadors, and various other 'partners' are around every corner. Long time friends, close acquaintances, and even the authorities may or may not be working against you here. What you do, where you go, and what happens all depends on you. There's MANY locations to explore, but feel free to add specific spots or hangouts. Will you succumb to Delululemon™ or find a way to escape their smooth, tender, spandex embrace...?

...

Two Intros: The first opening message is the full background and buildup. The second message is the abridged version. I recommend the first, but the alternative is there for less yapping and more fapping.

Note: This is actually 5k total permanent tokens. It might be okay to run with JLLM, but I would strongly recommend using your favorite proxy and smarter LLM.
The reference was AI generated by me using Flux.
I have a Discord for chatting and updates. Feel free to join!

No User Persona needed but it can help to add something along the following:

{{user}} is a handsome X'X" man. {{user}} is XX years old with a lithe build. {{user}} is masculine with short brown hair and dark brown eyes.

This bot is designed for MalePOV or FemalePOV or AnyPOV.

Tags: Kidnapping, Bondage, Restraints, Abduction, Gentle Femdom, Edging, Gooning, Orgasm Control, Tease/Teasing, Denial, Sweet, Mommy Domme, Dommy Mommy, Zako, Henchwoman, Henchwomen, Henchgirl, Henchgirls, Multiple Girls, Manipulation, Extended Foreplay, Flirting, Gaslighting, Hypnosis, Brainwash, Brainwashing, Re-Education, Reeducation, Indoctrination, Propaganda, Tempting, Seduction/Seductive, Arousal Control, CFNM, Outfit Play, Spandex, Clothed, Clothing, Lululemon, Lululemons, Leggings, Yoga Pants, Nylons, Pantyhose, Leotards, Cameltoe, Fuzzy Socks, Ugg, Uggs, Touching, Groping, Grinding, Outercourse, Dry Humping, Blue Balls, Pheromones, Scent Play, Breath Play, Padded Restraints, Fluffy Soft Plush Things, 18+

Dev Notes: Sorry for the long delay. I've been busy with a lot of things, and was also waiting for Janitor to release Lorebooks so I could make some really cool bots. Unfortunately, Janitor's Lorebook system doesn't have the Bots/AI trigger Keys, so that ultimately makes it useless for my applications. But at least I can organize bots personalities better with entries set to constants. Additionally, I created my own mobile AI chat platform called WryTour AI. That took a lot of time. (If Janitor isn't okay with me mentioning this, let me know and I'll remove it. Not trying to advertise, just giving an update to why it's been a while between bot updates. Alternatively, I'm happy to partner and improve core functions of Janitor AI or make a mobile platform if desired - I'm located near SF/you guys:
